text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF reports two soldiers were moderately injured and six others lightly wounded after an explosive drone struck the area where they were operating in southern Lebanon earlier this Monday. All of the injured were evacuated to hospital for medical treatment, and their families have been notified. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军报告称，本周一早些时候，一架爆炸性无人机袭击了他们在黎巴嫩南部行动的区域，造成两名士兵中度受伤，另有六人轻伤。所有伤者均已被送往医院接受治疗，其家属已收到通知。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇶 Al-Araby Al-Jadeed: Iraq’s political scene has shifted to a new crisis over the premiership after the election of President Nizar Amidi. The Coordination Framework is deeply divided, with growing momentum to exclude its current nominee Nouri al‑Maliki.…" ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Iraq’s Shiite Coordination Framework has resumed intensive meetings to name a prime minister candidate. The first gathering is at Ammar al‑Hakim’s house. Out of 12 leaders, eight must sign the official letter to the president for the candidate to be commissioned. The constitution allows 14 days to avoid a political vacuum. Any candidate who secures two‑thirds of the framework’s votes will be their nominee. Nouri al‑Maliki has not yet withdrawn; he may condition his withdrawal on a candidate close to him. Other names include Haider al‑Abadi, Bassem al‑Badri, Mohsen al‑Mandlawi, Hamid al‑Shatri, Qasim al‑Araji, Ali Shukri and Muhammad Sahib al‑Daraji. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇶 Al-Araby Al-Jadeed：在尼扎尔·阿米迪（Nizar Amidi）总统当选后，伊拉克的政治局势因总理职位问题陷入了新的危机。协调框架内部严重分裂，排除其现任提名人努里·马利基（Nouri al‑Maliki）的呼声日益高涨……” ⚡️ 🇮🇶 伊拉克什叶派协调框架已恢复密集会议，以提名总理候选人。首次会议在阿马尔·哈基姆（Ammar al‑Hakim）家中举行。在12名领导人中，必须有8人签署致总统的正式信函，候选人才能获得任命。宪法规定有14天时间以避免政治真空。任何获得框架内三分之二选票的候选人将成为其提名人。努里·马利基尚未退出；他可能会以提名与其亲近的人为条件撤回。其他名字包括海德尔·阿巴迪（Haider al‑Abadi）、巴塞姆·巴德里（Bassem al‑Badri）、穆赫辛·曼德拉维（Mohsen al‑Mandlawi）、哈米德·沙特里（Hamid al‑Shatri）、卡西姆·阿拉吉（Qasim al‑Araji）、阿里·舒克里（Ali Shukri）和穆罕默德·萨希布·达拉吉（Muhammad Sahib al‑Daraji）。 @wfwitness

text: 🇭🇺 💬 🇷🇺 Russia is a security risk - Magyar 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 💬 🇷🇺 俄罗斯是一个安全风险 - 马扎尔（Magyar） 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Péter Magyar: We see that JD Vance stated, when he was here, that they will work with the next Hungarian government in the same way, regardless of whether it is led by Viktor Orbán or the opposition, whom they did not know at the time; I hope we will get to know each other.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔（Péter Magyar）：我们看到JD·万斯（JD Vance）在访问这里时表示，无论下一届匈牙利政府是由维克托·欧尔班（Viktor Orbán）领导，还是由当时他们还不了解的反对派领导，他们都将以同样的方式与匈牙利政府合作；我希望我们能互相了解。

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Israeli Channel 12 : A Saudi royal family source said there is no solution to the Iran threat without a U.S. ground invasion and regime change, similar to the 2003 fall of Saddam Hussein. The source stressed that any alternative must be secular and acceptable to the Iranian public, preferably not Crown Prince Reza Pahlavi. Saudi Arabia believes the war has not achieved its results and that Iran has become more aggressive towards the kingdom, Israel and the U.S. However, Riyadh does not see itself as a direct party to the conflict. “If we are exposed to Iranian aggression, each incident will have its own response,” the source said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 以色列第12频道：一位沙特王室消息人士称，如果不进行美国地面入侵并实现政权更迭（类似于2003年萨达姆·侯赛因倒台），伊朗威胁将无法解决。该消息人士强调，任何替代方案都必须是世俗的，并能被伊朗公众所接受，最好不是礼萨·巴列维（Reza Pahlavi）王储。沙特阿拉伯认为战争尚未达到预期结果，伊朗对沙特、以色列和美国的态度变得更加激进。然而，利雅得并不认为自己是冲突的直接参与方。“如果我们遭受伊朗的侵略，每一事件都将有其相应的回应，”该消息人士说。 @wfwitness

text: Péter Magyar: Russia is a security risk — and everyone knows it. I am not speaking about the Russian people — they are fantastic people — but about the Russian state. In Hungarian history, we have felt the Russian bear before. Europe must prepare. Europe must protect and defend itself.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：俄罗斯是一个安全风险——每个人都知道这一点。我说的不是俄罗斯人民——他们是了不起的人民——而是俄罗斯国家。在匈牙利历史上，我们以前就感受过俄罗斯熊的威胁。欧洲必须做好准备。欧洲必须保护和捍卫自己。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 12: A senior fellow at the Foundation for Defence of Democracies estimates that the U.S. naval blockade on the Strait of Hormuz will cost Iran approximately $276 million per day in lost exports and $159 million per day in imports – a combined daily loss of $435 million, or $13 billion per month. Over 90% of Iran’s annual trade, worth $109.7 billion, passes through the Gulf. Iran exported 1.5 million barrels of oil per day before the blockade, earning $139 million daily. Petrochemical exports of $19.7 billion over nine months (about $54 million/day) are also at risk. More than 90% of Iran’s maritime trade transits the Strait of Hormuz. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 以色列第12频道：保卫民主基金会的一位高级研究员估计，美国对霍尔木兹海峡的海上封锁将使伊朗每天损失约2.76亿美元的出口额和1.59亿美元的进口额——合计每天损失4.35亿美元，即每月130亿美元。伊朗每年超过90%的贸易额（价值1097亿美元）通过海湾地区。在封锁前，伊朗每天出口150万桶石油，每天收入1.39亿美元。九个月内价值197亿美元的石化产品出口（约5400万美元/天）也面临风险。伊朗超过90%的海上贸易通过霍尔木兹海峡。 @wfwitness

text: 🇭🇺 🇺🇸 Péter Magyar: I will not call Trump. But if he, or anyone from the U.S. administration, reaches out to us, we will be available. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 🇺🇸 彼得·马扎尔：我不会给特朗普打电话。但如果他或美国政府的任何人联系我们，我们将随时待命。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

Everyone is waiting for the first statements from the politician who brought an end to Orbán's 16-year rule. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043691424013529112/photo/1 tweet

text: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 "The blockade will be enforced impartially against vessels of all nations entering or departing Iranian ports and coastal areas, including all Iranian ports on the Arabian Gulf and Gulf of Oman. CENTCOM forces will not impede freedom of navigation for vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz to and from non-Iranian ports." - U.S. Central Command. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 “封锁将公正地针对所有进入或离开伊朗港口和沿海地区的各国船只，包括阿拉伯湾和阿曼湾的所有伊朗港口。中央司令部部队不会阻碍通过霍尔木兹海峡往返非伊朗港口的船只的航行自由。” - 美国中央司令部。与我们一起查看最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text_zh: 开源情报：现在是上午10点，上午10点还有两个小时。 - 开源情报推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 The UKMTO announced that new maritime restrictions on access to Iranian ports and coastal areas took effect at 14:00 UTC. ➡️ The measures apply to vessels of all flags operating with Iranian ports, oil terminals, and coastal facilities across the Arabian Gulf, Gulf of Oman, and the Arabian Sea east of the Strait of Hormuz. ➡️ The restrictions cover the entire Iranian coastline, though neutral ships already in port have been given a "limited grace period" to leave. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 英国海上贸易行动办公室（UKMTO）宣布，针对伊朗港口和沿海地区准入的新海上限制措施已于协调世界时（UTC）14:00生效。➡️ 这些措施适用于所有在阿拉伯湾、阿曼湾和霍尔木兹海峡以东的阿拉伯海与伊朗港口、石油码头和沿海设施进行业务往来的悬挂各国旗帜的船只。➡️ 限制范围覆盖整个伊朗海岸线，尽管已经在港口的外国中立船只获得了“有限的宽限期”以离开。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran military spokesman: If the U.S. imposes a blockade, Iran says it will decisively implement a “permanent mechanism” to control the Strait of Hormuz. Iran military spokesman: “U.S. restrictions on vessels in international waters is illegal” You can’t make this up. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043689542977278158/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗军事发言人：如果美国实施封锁，伊朗表示将果断实施“永久机制”来控制霍尔木兹海峡。伊朗军事发言人：“美国对国际水域船只的限制是非法的”。你简直不敢相信。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043689542977278158/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Péter Magyar says he wants to bring back EU funding to improve Hungary's economy but doesn't support Ukraine's "fast-track accession to the EU" and that "Hungary should opt out" of the 90B loan to Ukraine as "Hungary is in a very difficult financial situation." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043690092284284935/video/1 tweet

But as of now, we have not made a decision to enter this war." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043689721197408422/photo/1 tweet

text_zh: 开源情报：最新 🔴 纽约邮报：伊朗官员正在权衡是否放弃铀浓缩，作为美国结束战争的条件。推文

text: Visioner 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 TISZA's Péter Magyar: We do not support Ukraine's accelerated accession to the EU. On one hand, we are talking about a country at war; it is absolutely absurd for a country at war to be admitted to the European Union. You can't even have real negotiations with all the accession chapters, so I don't think it's relevant at the moment. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 蒂萨党（TISZA）的彼得·马扎尔：我们不支持乌克兰加速加入欧盟。一方面，我们谈论的是一个处于战争状态的国家；让一个处于战争状态的国家加入欧盟是绝对荒谬的。你甚至无法就所有入盟章节进行真正的谈判，所以我认为目前这并不相关。推文

text_zh: 开源情报：匈牙利选举获胜者马扎尔：“我们需要与美国保持良好关系”。匈牙利选举获胜者马扎尔：“美国是一个非常重要的伙伴”。匈牙利选举获胜者马扎尔：“我不会给特朗普打电话”。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043688841618358518/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Spanish judge has charged Spains PM Sanchez’s wife with: • Tráfico de influencias (influence peddling) • Corrupción en los negocios (corruption in the private sector/business corruption) • Malversación de caudales públicos (embezzlement/misappropriation of public funds) • Apropiación indebida (misappropriation) NEW 🔴 The wife of Spain’s Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez has been formally charged with influence peddling and corruption. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043682489399443718/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：西班牙法官已对西班牙首相桑切斯（Sanchez）的妻子提出指控：• 影响力交易（influence peddling） • 商业腐败（corruption in the private sector/business corruption） • 挪用公款（embezzlement/misappropriation of public funds） • 不当挪用（misappropriation） 最新 🔴 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯（Pedro Sánchez）的妻子已被正式指控犯有影响力交易和腐败罪。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043682489399443718/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: OSINTdefender According to Hungary’s incoming prime minister, Peter Magyar, his government will look to reverse Prime Minister Viktor Orban’s decision to withdraw from the International Criminal Court (ICC). Additionally, on the Hungary-Israel relationship, Magyar said that EU decisions on Israel will continue to be blocked, but will be investigated on a case-by-case basis. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：据匈牙利候任总理彼得·马扎尔称，他的政府将寻求推翻维克托·欧尔班总理退出国际刑事法院（ICC）的决定。此外，关于匈牙利与以色列的关系，马扎尔表示，欧盟关于以色列的决定将继续被阻止，但将逐案进行调查。推文

text: Trump's deadline is over. The U.S. blockade of Iran begins.
text_zh: 特朗普的最后期限已过。美国对伊朗的封锁开始了。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump announced that the United States Navy will immediately begin blockading any ships trying to enter or leave the Strait of Hormuz. He said the talks with Iran went well and most points were agreed, but the nuclear issue was…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The blockade of the Strait of Hormuz is now in effect after U.S. President Trump’s 10am deadline has passed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普宣布，美国海军将立即开始封锁任何试图进入或离开霍尔木兹海峡的船只。他说与伊朗的会谈进展顺利，大多数要点已达成一致，但核问题……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 在美国总统特朗普的上午10点最后期限过后，对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁现已生效。 @wfwitness

text: 🇭🇺 💬 🇷🇺 Magyar stated that he would like to discuss with Putin the terms and cost of Hungary's and Russia's current energy agreements He hopes that the EU will lift sanctions against Russia after the conflict in Ukraine ends. Hungary will do everything to diversify energy supplies but this does not mean refusing to supply from Russia, he stated 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 💬 🇷🇺 马扎尔表示，他希望与普京讨论匈牙利和俄罗斯当前能源协议的条款和成本。他希望在乌克兰冲突结束后，欧盟能解除对俄罗斯的制裁。他表示，匈牙利将尽一切努力实现能源供应多元化，但这并不意味着拒绝俄罗斯的供应 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Péter Magyar: Ukraine is the victim of this war. Everyone knows that. No one should tell Ukraine under what conditions it must enter peace or sign a peace treaty. We cannot ask any country to give up its territory. If they do, they would be considered traitors.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：乌克兰是这场战争的受害者。每个人都知道这一点。没有人应该告诉乌克兰在什么条件下必须实现和平或签署和平条约。我们不能要求任何国家放弃其领土。如果他们这样做，他们将被视为叛徒。

text: 🇷🇺 💬 🇭🇺 Russia is ready to build relations with the new Hungarian government but everything depends on its understanding of national interests, Lavrov stated. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 💬 🇭🇺 拉夫罗夫表示，俄罗斯准备与新的匈牙利政府建立关系，但一切都取决于其对国家利益的理解。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇭🇺 Péter Magyar calls for Hungary's President to resign saying that he didn't say a word when thousands of Hungarian children were abused by pedophiles 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇭🇺 💬 🇺🇦 Magyar agrees with Hungary's refusal to provide Ukraine with an EU loan of €90 billion However - "No one should tell Ukrainians on what terms the war needs to end" He stated that he does not support the accelerated accession of Ukraine to the EU, emphasizing the need for an equal approach to all candidate countries. According to him, the issue of Ukraine's membership could be put to a referendum, but this is not expected to happen in the next ten years. At the same time, he noted that the restoration of the rights of the ethnic Hungarian minority will be a key condition for the normalization of relations with Ukraine. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇭🇺 彼得·马扎尔呼吁匈牙利总统辞职，称当成千上万的匈牙利儿童受到恋童癖者虐待时，他一言不发 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇭🇺 💬 🇺🇦 马扎尔同意匈牙利拒绝向乌克兰提供900亿欧元欧盟贷款。然而——“没有人应该告诉乌克兰人战争需要在什么条件下结束”。他表示不支持乌克兰加速加入欧盟，强调需要对所有候选国采取平等对待。据他所知，乌克兰的成员资格问题可以进行全民公投，但预计未来十年内不会发生。同时，他指出，恢复匈牙利少数民族的权利将是关系正常化的关键条件。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇩🇿 GRAPHIC: A Suicide attack occurred on Mohamed Boudiaf street in the city of Blida, approximately 48 kilometres south‑west of Algiers. Security reinforcements have been deployed. Geolocation: (For Nerds) 36.4830480, 2.8259680 @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇩🇿 图文：在布利达市（Blida）的穆罕默德·布迪亚夫街（Mohamed Boudiaf street）发生了一起自杀式袭击，该市位于阿尔及尔西南约48公里处。安全增援部队已部署。地理定位：（极客专用）36.4830480, 2.8259680 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 The UKMTO has announced that maritime access restrictions affecting Iranian ports and coastal areas came into force at 1400 UTC on 13 April 2026. The measures apply to vessels of all flags engaging with Iranian ports, oil terminals, and coastal facilities across the Arabian Gulf, Gulf of Oman, and the Arabian Sea east of the Strait of Hormuz. The restrictions cover the entire Iranian coastline, including key ports and energy infrastructure, while neutral vessels currently in Iranian ports have been granted a limited grace period to depart. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 英国海上贸易行动办公室（UKMTO）宣布，影响伊朗港口和沿海地区的海上准入限制措施已于2026年4月13日协调世界时（UTC）14:00生效。这些措施适用于所有在阿拉伯湾、阿曼湾和霍尔木兹海峡以东的阿拉伯海与伊朗港口、石油码头和沿海设施进行业务往来的悬挂各国旗帜的船只。限制范围覆盖整个伊朗海岸线，包括主要港口和能源基础设施，而目前在伊朗港口的中立船只已获得有限的宽限期以离开。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli military announced that it has confirmed that more than 250 Hezbollah members and commanders were killed in the largest strike of Operation Roaring Lion on 8 April across Beirut, the Bekaa and southern Lebanon. Those killed included Hassan Mustafa Nasser (head of logistics support headquarters), Ali Qassem, Abu Ali Abbas and Ali Hijazi (senior intelligence commanders), and Abu Muhammad Habib (deputy commander of Hezbollah’s missile unit). Lebanon’s health ministry reported 357 total dead in that strike wave, meaning at least 70% of those killed were Hezbollah members, using the IDF's claimed assessment. The total number of Hezbollah fighters allegedly eliminated in the current campaign has now exceeded 1,500. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列军方宣布，已确认在4月8日“咆哮狮子行动”（Operation Roaring Lion）中，在贝鲁特、贝卡谷地和黎巴嫩南部进行的最大规模打击中，有超过250名真主党成员和指挥官被击毙。死者包括哈桑·穆斯塔法·纳赛尔（Hassan Mustafa Nasser，后勤支援总部负责人）、阿里·卡西姆（Ali Qassem）、阿布·阿里·阿巴斯（Abu Ali Abbas）和阿里·希贾齐（Ali Hijazi，高级情报指挥官），以及阿布·穆罕默德·哈比卜（Abu Muhammad Habib，真主党导弹部队副指挥官）。黎巴嫩卫生部报告称，该波打击共造成357人死亡，这意味着根据以色列国防军声称的评估，至少70%的死者是真主党成员。目前在当前行动中被消灭的真主党武装人员总数已超过1500人。 @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong: *** Join Danny Haiphong LIVE today April 13th 11am eastern 5pm CET w/ Mohammad Marandi*** Prof. Marandi details his experience in Islamabad for the negotiations between he US and Iran, and what the blockade declared by Trump on Iran's ports means for the country and the world. Don't miss the latest update on the next phase of the war as the war restarts amid failed peace talks. Watch here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3_YeUduTclU
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong：*** 加入丹尼·海丰（Danny Haiphong）今天的直播，4月13日东部时间上午11点，中欧时间下午5点，嘉宾：穆罕默德·马兰迪（Mohammad Marandi）*** 马兰迪教授详细介绍了他在伊斯兰堡参与美伊谈判的经历，以及特朗普宣布对伊朗港口实施的封锁对该国和世界意味着什么。不要错过战争重启、和平谈判失败后战争下一阶段的最新更新。观看地址：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3_YeUduTclU

text: Péter Magyar: If Vladimir Putin calls me, I will pick up the phone. I do not think that will happen. I will not call him myself, but if we do talk, I can tell him to please stop the killing now, after four years, and end that war, which doesn't make any sense from their point of view either, because tens of thousands of Russians have lost their lives. I don't think he is going to end the war on my advice. I very much hope that he will be forced to do so regardless.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：如果弗拉基米尔·普京给我打电话，我会接听。我不认为会发生这种情况。我自己不会给他打电话，但如果我们谈话，我可以告诉他，请在四年后停止杀戮，结束那场战争，从他们的角度来看，这场战争也没有任何意义，因为成千上万的俄罗斯人已经失去了生命。我不认为他会听从我的建议结束战争。我非常希望他无论如何都会被迫这样做。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Beirut Disaster Management Center: The damaged building targeted by the IDF on Wednesday will be demolished following a strike in Tallet El Khayat, Verdun due to the danger it poses to public safety. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 贝鲁特灾害管理中心：周三以色列国防军在凡尔登（Verdun）的塔莱特·埃尔·卡亚特（Tallet El Khayat）进行打击后，受损的建筑物因对公共安全构成危险将被拆除。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Israel’s Supreme Court has barred public entry to the courtroom during the hearing on the potential dismissal of Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir, citing concerns over possible disruptions and outbursts. It was announced that the proceedings will be broadcast live. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列最高法院已禁止公众在审理部长伊塔马尔·本-格维尔（Itamar Ben-Gvir）潜在罢免案期间进入法庭，理由是担心可能出现干扰和爆发冲突。宣布审判过程将进行现场直播。 @wfwitness

text: Péter Magyar on Ukraine: We do not support Ukraine's accelerated accession to the EU. On one hand, we are talking about a country at war; it is absolutely absurd for a country at war to be admitted to the European Union.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔谈乌克兰：我们不支持乌克兰加速加入欧盟。一方面，我们谈论的是一个处于战争状态的国家；让一个处于战争状态的国家加入欧盟是绝对荒谬的。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli drone activity detected over the Jnah Neighborhood of Beirut. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 在贝鲁特吉纳赫（Jnah）社区上空探测到以色列无人机活动。 @wfwitness

text: Péter Magyar on Russian oil: Russia stays here, Hungary stays here. We will do everything for diversification, but this does not mean that we will decouple. We will always get oil as cheaply and safely as possible.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔谈俄罗斯石油：俄罗斯留在这里，匈牙利留在这里。我们将尽一切努力实现多元化，但这并不意味着我们将脱钩。我们将始终尽可能廉价且安全地获得石油。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The official X account for Israel posted a humorous image insinuating that Hezbollah was standing in the way of peace negotiations with Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列官方X账号发布了一张幽默图片，暗示真主党阻碍了与黎巴嫩的和平谈判。

text: Ukraine carried out a long-range drone strike on the Apatit (PhosAgro) chemical plant in Cherepovets, deep inside Russia (about 800–1,000 km from Ukraine). The plant is a major fertilizer and chemical producer, with some materials considered potentially dual-use.
text_zh: 乌克兰对俄罗斯境内的阿帕提特（Apatit/PhosAgro）化工厂进行了远程无人机袭击，该厂位于俄罗斯腹地（距离乌克兰约800-1000公里）。该厂是主要的化肥和化工生产商，其中一些材料被认为具有潜在的军民两用性。

text: 🇮🇷 🇻🇦 Iranian President Pazeshkian in a message to Pope Leo XIV: I condemn the insult to Your Excellency on behalf of the great nation of Iran, and declare that the desecration of Jesus, the prophet of peace and brotherhood, is not acceptable to any free person. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇻🇦 伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬（Pazeshkian）在致教皇利奥十四世（Pope Leo XIV）的信息中表示：我代表伟大的伊朗民族谴责对阁下的侮辱，并声明亵渎耶稣这位和平与兄弟情谊的先知，是任何自由人都无法接受的。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
